hero.subtitle: Support the education, coaching and leadership of young people from an oasis at the gates of the Sahara. Every donation shapes a leader of tomorrow.

about.title: شارك — Share, Participate
about.subtitle: SHAAREC supports the youth of Zourgane towards academic excellence and leadership, giving them access to high-level coaching.
about.quote: Your donation is not charity, it's an investment in the future elite of Zourgane. Every euro or dirham directly funds access to technology, high-level coaching and excellent educational resources.

impact.title: Concrete results
impact.subtitle: As Quality (QHSE) experts, we guarantee full traceability of every donation. Transparency and rigor at every step.

methodology.title: A methodology of excellence
methodology.subtitle: A hybrid coaching approach combining academic rigor, soft skills and human support.

academic.title: Academic support
academic.desc: Math, physics, science — dedicated teachers to prepare for the baccalaureate with excellence.

coaching.title: Coaching & Leadership
coaching.desc: Soft skills, confidence, dawn discipline — forging the mindset of leaders.

psychology.title: Psychological support
psychology.desc: Individual and group support, mental preparation for exams and post-baccalaureate life.

orientation.title: Post-baccalaureate guidance
orientation.desc: Partnerships to guide students toward the best programs and opportunities.

donate.title: Choose your impact
donate.subtitle: Every contribution is an investment in Zourgane's future. Free amount also available.
donate.freeAmountPrompt: Prefer to choose your own amount?

connection.name: Connection
connection.desc: Support internet access and digital tools (webcams, tablets).

mentorship.name: Mentorship
mentorship.desc: Sponsor a leader's coaching for a full semester.

sovereignty.name: Sovereignty
sovereignty.desc: Fund scientific equipment and excellence scholarships.

team.title: The Council of Sages
team.subtitle: Passionate experts, united by the vision of a youth of excellence in Zourgane.

cta.title: Ready to change lives?
cta.subtitle: Join the SHAAREC community and help build a generation of leaders from the rural world.

footer.description: From Zourgane to the World: building a sovereignty of excellence for the leaders of tomorrow.
